title: How to Update Your Car Listing on BuyAndScrap.com (Sell Faster!)
metaDescription: Selling your car on BuyAndScrap.com? Learn exactly how to update your listing quickly. Keep mileage, price, and photos fresh to attract buyers faster. Get your car sold!
targetKeyword: how do i update my listing
content:
To update your car listing on BuyAndScrap.com, simply log in to your account and navigate to 'My Listings'. Select your advert, click 'Edit', make your desired changes, and then hit 'Save'. This process is quick and easy. Keeping your listing current helps attract serious buyers and ensures all details are accurate, speeding up your sale.

## Why Update Your Car Listing?

Keeping your car advert accurate is vital. From our experience, an outdated listing can really deter potential buyers. Buyers value honesty and current information. It builds trust and avoids awkward surprises. Imagine a buyer viewing your car only to find the mileage is miles off!

Regular updates show you're serious about selling. It ensures details like current mileage, recent service history, or a new set of tyres are all visible. You might even have new photos to upload! Ready to update your car and sell it swiftly? [Sell your car](/sell) with confidence at BuyAndScrap.com.

## How to Update Your BuyAndScrap.com Listing: Step-by-Step

Don't worry, giving your car advert a refresh is straightforward. Here’s a quick, easy guide to getting it done. This is how you update your listing and get it looking perfect for buyers.

### Step 1: Log In to Your Account

First things first, head to BuyAndScrap.com. Log in using your registered email and password. You'll find the 'Login' button at the top right of the page.

### Step 2: Find Your Advert

Once logged in, you’ll reach your personal dashboard. Look for the 'My Listings' or 'My Adverts' section. This shows all the cars you currently have for sale.

### Step 3: Select and Edit

Find the specific car you want to tweak. Next to each listing, you'll see an 'Edit' button or a pencil icon. Give that a click!

### Step 4: Make Your Changes

Now for the important bit! You're in the listing editor. Here, you can easily change almost anything:

*   **Price:** Decided to drop the price for a quicker sale?
*   **Description:** Added a new feature or recent service details?
*   **Mileage:** Always keep this accurate as you continue to drive.
*   **Photos:** Snapped some amazing new pictures? Upload them now!
*   **Contact Details:** Changed your phone number or email?

### Step 5: Save and Publish

Happy with your updates? Great! Make sure to click the 'Save Changes' or 'Update Listing' button. This pushes your refreshed advert live. Your updated listing will be visible to all potential buyers in just a minute or two.

## Common Questions About Updating Your Car Listing

Need a little more help? Here are some frequently asked questions.

### Q: How long does it take for changes to appear?
A: Your changes usually go live almost instantly after you hit 'Save'. Give it a minute or two, then refresh the page to see your updated listing.

### Q: Can I change the price on my listing?
A: Yes, absolutely! Changing your price is one of the most common updates. Just follow the steps above and edit the price field. Sometimes a small price drop can make all the difference.

### Q: What if I can't log in to my account?
A: No worries! If you're having trouble logging in, use the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page. If you still need a hand, our friendly support team is ready to help. We also have more helpful car selling [guides](/guides) available.

Ready to find your next car? [Browse Cars](/cars) today!
